epigraph.text: For as in one body we have many members, and the members do not all have the same function.
epigraph.quote: ANOVA is essentially the analysis of variation among and within groups.

content.text: ANOVA tests whether means differ across multiple groups simultaneously.

We have $k$ groups with sample sizes $n_1, \ldots, n_k$ and means 
$\xbar_1, \ldots, \xbar_k$. Total sample size $N = n_1 + \cdots + n_k$.

content.title: One-Way ANOVA Hypotheses

content.text:
With $k$ groups, there are $\binom{k}{2}$ pairwise comparisons. 
Multiple tests inflate the overall Type I error rate. ANOVA tests 
all groups simultaneously at the specified $\alpha$.

items: **Normality:** Each group comes from a normal distribution
**Equal variances:** All groups have the same variance $\sigma^2$

**Between-group variation:** How much do group means differ 
 from the overall mean?

**Within-group variation:** How much do observations vary 
 within each group?

content.text:
If $H_0$ is true, these should be similar. If group means truly differ, 
between-group variation will be larger than expected.

marginNotes.text:
There is neither Jew nor Greek, 
there is neither slave nor free, there is no male and female, for 
you are all one in Christ Jesus.
